headline: Block Inc. (XYZ) A High-Growth  Large-Cap Stock To Invest In For Financial Services Exposure
summary: Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) is one of the high-growth large-cap stocks to invest in now. On June 12, Block Inc.’s (NYSE:XYZ) financial services unit, Square Financial Services, launched a higher-yield savings tier, offering a 3.50% annual percentage yield. The 3.50% annual percentage yield applies to Square sellers who maintain a daily balance of more than $10,000 […]
